title: Integrated place description
objective: Describir un lugar y preguntar por lo que existe.

activities.prompt: There is a cafe and there are two shops.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Escucha a cafe y two shops.

activities.prompt: There ___ a park and three benches.
activities.feedback_incorrect: La estructura comienza con There is a park.

activities.prompt: There are a shop and two cafes.
activities.correct_answer: There is a shop and two cafes.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Usa There is antes de a shop.

activities.prompt: There is a park. There are three benches. There isn't a cafe.
There is a library near the school. There are four computers inside. There isn't a cafe.
activities.question: How many computers are there?

activities.prompt: Write six sentences using there is, there are and one negative.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Incluye al menos una pregunta o negación al revisar.

activities.prompt: Ask the AI about places in a neighborhood and describe what you find.
activities.feedback_correct: La IA evalúa existencia y claridad.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Elige is o are según la cantidad.

activities.prompt: Describe what there is and what there are near you.
activities.feedback_correct: Transferiste la estructura a tu entorno.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Observa primero y clasifica singular o plural.

activities.prompt: Describe a place, ask three questions and give one negative answer.
